title: Search Metadata, Indexing Directives, Canonical Signals, and Language Alternates · Behavior Case: Title Description Evidence
summary: The audit equates crawl permission with indexability, trusts one canonical tag, ignores HTTP robots fields, and reports hreflang without reciprocal or language checks. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the title description evidence increment in search discovery and indexability audit record. Learners progress through predictio…
objectives: Extract title and description candidates with cardinality, location, text quality, changed-case, and stakeholder-specific non-ranking claims.
Classify transport, metadata, template, content, accessibility, structured-data, and extraction-rule changes with prior and current evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-title-description-evidence — Extract title and description candidates with cardinality, location, text quality, changed-case, and stakeholder-specific non-ranking claims.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-indexing-canonical-hreflang-5
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-indexing-canonical-hreflang-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual public-service site review.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it.
def worked_scraper_indexing_canonical_hreflang_5(pages: int = 36, indexing_decisions: int = 36, canonical_conflicts: int = 4, alternate_sets: int = 6, unsupported_index_guarantees: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorizationworked5",
        "url9036",
        "response5dekrow",
        "treeworked59036",
        "frontier9036worked5",
        "report5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if pages < 1 or indexing_decisions < 0:
        return False, indexing_decisions, "indexing-count"
    if indexing_decisions != pages:
        return False, indexing_decisions, "indexing-reconciliation"
    if canonical_conflicts < 0 or alternate_sets < 1:
        return False, canonical_conflicts, "search-signal-evidence"
    if unsupported_index_guarantees > 0:
        return False, unsupported_index_guarantees, "index-guarantee"
    assert indexing_decisions == pages and unsupported_index_guarantees == 0
    return True, indexing_decisions, "evidence-based-indexability-audit"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-title-description-evidence-rznj7m
# Competency: scraper-title-description-evidence.
# Case 7101: a clean package and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: automated findings must not claim ranking or WCAG conformance.
# Changed case: change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope.
def evidence_scraper_title_description_evidence_rznj7m(pages: int = 36, indexing_decisions: int = 36, canonical_conflicts: int = 4, alternate_sets: int = 6, unsupported_index_guarantees: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_rznj7m = "rznj7m-m7jnzr-7101"
    assert evidence_variant_rznj7m
    evidence_axes_rznj7m = (
        "authorizationrznj7m",
        "url7101",
        "responsem7jnzr",
        "treerznj7m7101",
        "frontier7101rznj7m",
        "reportm7jnzr7101",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_rznj7m)) == 6
    if pages < 1 or indexing_decisions < 0:
        return False, indexing_decisions, "indexing-count"
    if indexing_decisions != pages:
        return False, indexing_decisions, "indexing-reconciliation"
    if canonical_conflicts < 0 or alternate_sets < 1:
        return False, canonical_conflicts, "search-signal-evidence"
    if unsupported_index_guarantees > 0:
        return False, unsupported_index_guarantees, "index-guarantee"
    assert indexing_decisions == pages and unsupported_index_guarantees == 0
    return True, indexing_decisions, "evidence-based-indexability-audit"
